settings.title: Spring Equinox Morning Workshop
settings.excerpt: Mark the turn of the season with a two hour Saturday morning practice followed by tea together.
settings.body:
The equinox is a natural moment to pause and reset, and we are holding a special workshop to mark it. Join us on a Saturday morning for two unhurried hours on the mat.

The session moves from gentle waking movement into a flowing sequence and ends with a long, deep rest. It is designed to shake off winter heaviness and meet the lighter months with energy.

Afterwards we will share tea and something to eat in the studio. It is as much about community as it is about the practice.

Spaces are limited by the size of our room, so please reserve early. All levels are welcome and props are provided.
